$comment: Catalyst Configuration Template - Copy to config.json and fill in values. Secrets go in ~/.config/catalyst/config-{projectKey}.json

deploy.$comment: Per-repo deploy verification config (CTL-211). Set skipDeployVerification: false for repos that emit GitHub Deployments to enable the orchestrator's merged → deploying → done state machine. Default for unknown repos is skipDeployVerification: true (today's CTL-133 behavior — done immediately on PR merge).

filter._comment: Semantic event routing via Groq. Set GROQ_API_KEY env var to enable.
